message:
test(fcp-conformance): add E2E log migration scenario (bd-ycmu)

- Generate v1 logs (implicit and explicit version)
- Generate v2 logs with explicit version
- Migrate v1 to v2 by adding log_version field
- Validate all entry types against schema
- Validate mixed v1/v2 JSONL
- Persist JSONL artifacts to /tmp/fcp-e2e-logs/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
